## Status Key

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| Yes | Requirement addressed — evidence found in project artifacts |
| Partial | Partially addressed — action needed |
| No | Not addressed |
| N/A | Not applicable to this project |

---

## GDPR Checklist

_Skip this section if GDPR is not in scope._

| # | Requirement | Status | Evidence / location | Action required |
|---|------------|--------|--------------------|-|
| G1 | Lawful basis for processing personal data identified and documented | | | |
| G2 | Data minimisation principle applied | | | |
| G3 | Data retention policy defined | | | |
| G4 | Data subject rights addressed (access, erasure, portability) | | | |
| G5 | Privacy by design considered in solution design | | | |
| G6 | Data processor agreements in place (where relevant) | | | |
| G7 | DPIA (Data Protection Impact Assessment) completed if high risk | | | |

---

## SOC 2 Checklist

_Skip this section if SOC 2 is not in scope._

| # | Requirement | Status | Evidence / location | Action required |
|---|------------|--------|--------------------|-|
| S1 | Access controls defined and documented | | | |
| S2 | Change management process defined | | | |
| S3 | Incident response plan in place | | | |
| S4 | Availability targets (SLA) defined | | | |
| S5 | Monitoring and alerting defined | | | |
| S6 | Vendor risk management considered | | | |

| IG4 | Budget authority confirmed | | | |
